feed.subtitle: Crafting and Gathering for the modern Warrior of Light

entry.title: Expert Crafting — An Overview
entry.summary: If you wish to make an apple pie from scratch, you must first invent the universe. — Carl Sagan Expert Crafting Expert crafting exists to remove the illusion that crafting in Final Fantasy XIV is solved. These recipes were designed to resist macro automation, enforce resource awareness, and reward the crafter who understands why an action is chosen rather than merely when. While later ex...

entry.title: Pilgrims Traverse 1-20 — Floorset Guide
entry.summary: Deep Dungeon PT 1-20 — Floorset Guide This guide covers Floors 1–20 of Pilgrims Traverse, split into two difficulty bands. Early floors introduce mechanics safely, while Floors 11–20 escalate damage, enemy density, and mimic risk. PT 1-10 Overview Floors Rooms Enemies Chests Mimics Hoard Reward 1-10 3-6 2-3 ...

entry.title: Eureka Orthos - A Deep Dungeon Guide

link.title: Eureka Orthos - A Deep Dungeon Guide

entry.summary: Delving into Eureka Orthos Getting Started Quest NPC Location Delve Into Myth Koh Rabntah Mor Dhona (X:21.8 Y:8.1) This Quest Has Prerequisites: Level 81+ Disciple of War or Magic Endwalker What Lies Beneath Preparing for a Run What Job To Play? Melee DPS seem to have it easier in this variation of...
